# Skill: Workflow - Feature Delivery

Use this workflow when implementing a feature end-to-end.

1. Clarify feature requirements and acceptance criteria.
2. Add/adjust service and model contracts first.
3. Implement ViewModel and UI bindings.
4. Wire navigation/registration.
5. Add tests for validation/error paths.
6. Run build and tests.
7. Summarize changed files and risks.
